name: The Golf Nation (TGN)
address: 142 S Van Brunt St, Englewood, NJ 07631
about: The Golf Nation is a membership-based indoor golf training facility in Englewood, NJ, focused on using advanced technology and expert coaching to help golfers of all levels improve their game. It offers year-round access to a private, state-of-the-art studio equipped with tour-level technology like GCQuad launch monitors and 3D motion capture. The facility provides a mix of individual practice, coaching, and group lessons, creating a community-oriented environment for dedicated golfers looking to enhance their skills and mental game.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to professional-grade technology like GCQuad launch monitors and 3D motion capture
Data-driven, personalized instruction from PGA-certified coaches
All-weather, year-round training facility with a focus on measurable improvement

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service available on-site
No mention of alcohol service available on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary launch monitor for coaching and detailed analysis
For ground force analysis and swing dynamics

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs for practice sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service on-site, so you may be able to bring your own.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to complete 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Golf Nation offers programs for juniors and youth, and mentions group lessons with families.
